case_title: CALIFORNIA CHECK CASHING STORES, LLC VS. JOHNSON SECURITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-22-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON SECURITY COMPANY (JOHNSON SECURITY COMPANY AKA JOHNSON SECURITY & PROTECTION, LLC)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB. 15, 2008. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2008 - JUDGMENT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY.
